name: 5-Node BFT Testnet
objective: Minimal BFT CNF, measure solve time and bandwidth

four_pillars.correctness: BFT consensus proven by SAT before commitment
four_pillars.auditability: Every message SHA-256 logged, proofs drat-trim verified
four_pillars.reproducibility: Same config -> same CNF -> same consensus
four_pillars.competitiveness: If solve <1s, distributed formal verification is practical

contingency: If ANY gate fails -> abandon distributed consensus
